//: MuxPilot agent-state hooks for Codex CLI. Reference from ~/.codex/config.toml
//2: with `hooks = true` and `hooks_file = "~/.codex/hooks.json"`, or inline the
//3: equivalent [[hooks.*]] TOML. Codex ships a smaller hook set than Claude Code
//4: (no Notification/SessionEnd/subagents; PostToolUse is Bash-only), so waiting
//5: states come mainly from MuxPilot's own screen classification for Codex panes.
//6: MUXPILOT_AGENT=codex tags the pane as a Codex agent.
